episodes.title: She Escaped a Cult & Was Held at Gunpoint… (Criminologist Tells All)
episodes.description:
What really drives crime—and how close can it get to home?

In this episode of Full Access Redacted, I sit down with criminologist Brooke Wilson to break down the psychology behind crime, her personal experiences, and the shocking events that shaped her perspective.

We cover:

What criminologists actually study (and what most people get wrong)
The real reasons behind high crime rates in cities like St. Louis
The most disturbing cases she’s analyzed
Her experience being held at gunpoint
Growing up in a haunted house
And her story of joining—and escaping—a cult

This is one of the most intense and eye-opening conversations we’ve had.

👇 Follow Brooke:
TikTok: @BrookeeWilsonnnn
(Spelled Brooke with 2 E’s, Wilson with 4 N’s)

👍 If you enjoy real conversations like this, make sure to like, subscribe, and share.
